_comment: MERGE these blocks into your ~/.claude/settings.json (do not overwrite the whole file). 'permissions.allow' lets the recall/capture skills run memory-engine without a prompt; 'hooks.UserPromptSubmit' wires per-turn auto-retrieval; 'hooks.SessionStart' runs boot-time maintenance (corruption-recovery + archival sweep + stale-gated backup), fail-open. The hook command uses the PATH-resolved 'memory-engine'; if Claude Code can't resolve it on Windows, use the absolute path to the uv-tool shim instead, e.g. C:/Users/<you>/.local/bin/memory-engine.exe. Off switch: set MEMORY_ENGINE_DISABLED=1 or create ~/.claude/memory/DISABLED to make both hooks no-op instantly.
